content.en:
Nine Rivers Void.

Bang!!!

The vision of the birth of the Extreme Dao Treasure is too big, and fortunately, Ye Tian blocked this place, otherwise the vision of the birth of the Extreme Dao Treasure will definitely spread to an endless and distant area.

When the time comes, if other strong people are attracted, this place will be exposed.

Soon, the power of the Sword Extreme Dao converged, and a long sword was suspended in the Nine Rivers Void.

I saw that Ye Tian urged the power of the sword's extreme path, grabbed the sword with one hand, and subdued it in a short time.

"Extreme Treasure, I finally have it!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Then, he began to slowly refine the sword, and after a long time, he succeeded in refining the sword completely.

"Dao Destroying Sword!"

This is the name of this Extreme Treasure, which contains an incomparably terrifying Sword Extreme Path.

Compared with the super-perfect exotic treasures, the Extreme Dao Exotic Treasures contain an incomparably terrifying Extreme Dao Origin, and have unimaginable benefits for contemplating the Extreme Dao.

The super-perfect treasure can allow a cultivator to comprehend the extreme path, but after comprehending the extreme path, the super-perfect treasure is useless and can only be reduced to a weapon.

The Extreme Dao Treasure is different, it can help a strong person to enter the Extreme Dao and comprehend the Small Pole Dao or even the Great Pole Dao.

Therefore, the value of the Extreme Treasure is far from being comparable to that of the Superior Perfect Treasure.

In addition, as a weapon, the Extreme Treasure can also greatly increase its strength.

"With the Extreme Dao Treasure of the Dao Destroying Sword, I can completely use it to cultivate the Extreme Dao of the Sword to the Xiaocheng realm, and it takes a few more years to cultivate to the Dacheng realm. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

So in the following years, Ye Tian focused on comprehending the extreme path of the sword.

I have to say that there is no treasure similar to the Extreme Dao Monument of Time and Space, and there is no corresponding Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, and it is indeed very difficult to comprehend the Extreme Dao of the Sword, even if there is an Extreme Dao Treasure, it is the same.

After all, the most important thing for the Extreme Dao Treasure is to increase the strength, and the auxiliary comprehension is only an incidental effect, which is naturally not as good as treasures such as the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu and the Space-Time Extreme Dao Monument.

Of course, Ye Tian does not lack time, and some time slowly understands.

More than two billion eternal years later.

Ye Tian had finally cultivated the Extreme Dao of the Sword to the Dacheng realm.

In addition, Ye Tian has made progress again in the Time Pole Dao, and the Dacheng Time Pole Dao has already cultivated to the peak of the Dacheng Time Pole Dao, and it is not far from the Time Pole Dao of the Consummation Realm.

This is the anti-heaven effect of the Time Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu plus the Time and Space Extreme Dao Monument.

At present, in addition to the thousands of entry-level Extreme Dao, Ye Tian also has the Peak Time Pole Dao, the Dacheng Space Pole, the Dacheng Defense Pole, and the Dacheng Sword Pole.

With so many extreme dao superimposed, Ye Tian's endless extreme path also reached the realm of the peak of entry.

And in so many years, Ye Tian's cultivation has also been raised to the limit of the super-perfect controller under the accumulation of countless Extreme Dao treasures, and he has also broken eighteen Extreme Dao chains.

It can be said that the further you go, the more difficult it is to break the chains of the Pole Road.

For other super-level perfect controllers, it was an extravagant hope to break an extreme chain, but Ye Tian had already broken eighteen, which was enough to make countless super-perfect controllers jealous.

It stands to reason that Ye Tian can easily step into the Void Realm Perfect Controller now, but he is not in a hurry.

After all, the Endless Pole Dao has not yet stepped into Xiaocheng, and even if other Extreme Dao steps into Dacheng, he will not use other Extreme Dao to break through, after all, the most suitable for himself is the Endless Pole Dao.

Moreover, he also wanted to break all thirty-six Extreme Chains, which was the limit of the Extreme Chains.

Breaking the chains of the Extreme Dao can only be done in the realm of the super-perfect controller, once you break through to the realm of the perfect controller of the virtual realm, and the origin of the Extreme Dao is solidified, you can no longer use a treasure like the Extreme Golden Fruit to break the chain of the Extreme Dao.

Therefore, he doesn't want to break through like this, and wants to break through with the most perfect attitude.

......

"Calculate the time, the Extreme Dao Genius War is about to start, and there are only 100 million eternal years left, you can sign up!"

Ye Tian muttered.

For the end of the world, the Extreme Dao Genius Battle is not only an honor, but also an opportunity to recover many resources.

Although it is normal for most of the super-perfect controllers to fall, or even to be wiped out completely, once they come out alive, it will definitely be a big gain.

Moreover, the super-perfect controllers of the end of the world all have a clone of will, and only the creatures of the end of the world do not have a clone, so these super-perfect masters are not afraid of death and naturally dare to enter.

No Road Tower.

Ye Tian signed up through the Wudao Tower, and the Lord of Canggu reported the registration, as for where the specific report went, Ye Tian was not clear.

He only needed to know that when the time came, the Lord of the Ancient would wait for Ye Tian and other super perfect controllers to go and participate in the Extreme Dao Genius Battle.

After successfully registering, Ye Tian waited silently.

And the Lord of Time and they are preparing for the battle one by one, preparing for the Extreme Dao Genius Battle this time.

Not long before the Extreme Dao Genius Battle, several Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers such as the Lord of the Ancient and the Lord of the Pathless Dao summoned Ye Tian and many other Extreme Perfect Controllers.

At this time, the Lord of the Pathless Dao spoke: "In this Extreme Dao Genius Battle, there are some things that need to be told. In addition to the Endless Lord, other super-perfect masters, including the Lord of Time of the Sixth Tower Lord, don't think about killing the Extreme Dao creatures in the Extreme Dao Genius Battle, you must learn to be stubborn, don't be greedy, after finding a certain treasure, just hide it, as long as you live until the end of the Extreme Dao Genius Battle time, it will be victory!"

At this time, a super-perfect controller said: "Lord of the Dao, we are just clones of will, there is no need to be so timid. Are Extreme creatures really that scary?"

In fact, many of the super-perfect masters at the end of the world did not understand the extreme creatures in the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and even if they saw some descriptions in the classics, they would not have any intuitive feeling.

Only when you really enter the Extreme Deep Sea will you know the horror of the Extreme Deep Sea.

"Extreme Creatures are not terrifying, but their number is more than yours, not several times more, but hundreds of times more, even thousands of times, or even ten thousand times! Dense Extreme Perfect Masters are besieging you together, how can you stop them? Unless you have the strength to be truly almost invincible, you can compete with them, otherwise you should hide in peace. Although the last Extreme Dao Genius Battle suffered heavy losses, there were still survivors. However, there was an Extreme Genius Battle, and all the super-perfect controllers at the end of the realm fell. There are still a few sessions, and only a few of the Super Perfect Controllers have survived. If it weren't for the fact that you were going to the will clone, otherwise we would really not dare to let you participate in the Extreme Genius Battle. This is not a battle, it is a death! I only hope that you will die less and take more treasures. "

The Lord of the Pathless Path said it was cruel and demeaning to the super-perfect controllers of the Realm, but it was the truth.

"Yes!"

Several super-perfect controllers nodded their heads one after another.

In fact, before that, they really didn't know how terrible the Extreme Creature was, and they only participated for the rewards and benefits.

But what the Lord of the Pathless Ways said was so terrible that they had to pay attention to it.

But it doesn't matter much whether they value it or not, because their hope of surviving is very low, unless it's really bad luck.

Of course, this sentence was not said by the Lord of the Dao.

The Lord of the Daoless and the Lord of the Ancient Dynasty really valued Ye Tian, and they also expected Ye Tian to be able to fight for the end of the realm, and severely damage the Extreme Dao creatures of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea in this Extreme Dao Genius Battle.
